canonicalization.method: sha256 of json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=False, separators=(',',':'))

owner_authorization.authorization_text: YES authorize P274A_PROSPECTIVE_CONFIRMATION_PROTOCOL_DESIGN as design and pre-registration only.
owner_authorization.supersedes_stale_statement: The prior governance statement that P274A is 'recommended, not authorized' is stale after this owner authorization and is updated truthfully within the four-file whitelist.
owner_authorization.does_not_authorize: any execution, activation, prospective capture, infrastructure activation, P271 controlled apply, registry/recommendation mutation, P273B, deployment, or production apply.

p271_prospective_capture_lineage.purpose: append-only prospective ledger schema + causality + failure matrix design
isolated ledger module + synthetic tests (no production DB)
temp-DB additive migration rehearsal (production DB untouched)
controlled-deployment preflight; production apply NOT authorized
read-only production schema inspection; prospective state ABSENT_CLEAN

draw_cadence_evidence.cited_via: P272B (not re-opened; production DB never accessed)

rules: Exactly these three; no substitution, addition, or retrospective-preference removal.
No cross-lottery candidate; cross-lottery transfer remains unresolved and outside P274A.
No strategy-version substitution without a future separate protocol amendment authorized BEFORE prospective outcomes begin.
Candidate order must not affect statistical treatment.
frozen_candidates.provenance: All three are GO_CANDIDATE_RESEARCH_ONLY / STABILITY_PASS DAILY_539 cells in the merged P273A inference artifact; the only authorized prospective candidates.

prohibited_scope: branch switch in the protected workspace
production DB access of any kind
SQLite connection to the production DB (incl. read-only)

endpoint_contract.daily_539_success_condition: at least two main-number hits (hit_count >= 2) under the committed scorer semantics; identical to D539_M2_PLUS
endpoint_contract.special_role: none (no special number / no second zone for DAILY_539)
endpoint_contract.ticket_count_rule: actual distinct-ticket count per draw from canonical ticket identities

exact_null_contract.N_rule: actual distinct-ticket count from prospective canonical ticket identities (expected 3/3/5; MUST be verified per draw, not inferred from strategy name).
exact_null_contract.independent_with_replacement_approximati: REJECTED for final confirmation; 1-(1-W/T)^N may appear only as a non-final diagnostic.
exact_null_contract.varying_q_rule: constant-N draws -> exact one-sided binomial; if per-draw N varies -> exact one-sided Poisson-binomial over the actual per-draw q values.

rule: No historical or already-observed draw may count toward prospective confirmation.
A separately authorized activation task must write concrete activation_timestamp_utc and first_eligible_target_draw BEFORE any eligible outcome is observed or ingested.

first_eligible_target_draw = the first official DAILY_539 draw whose scheduled draw time is strictly later than BOTH (1) the P274A protocol merge timestamp AND (2) the separately recorded activation_timestamp_utc.
All target draws earlier than first_eligible_target_draw are permanently excluded.
No backfill across the boundary; no replacement of missing future draws with historical draws.
A delayed ingestion remains eligible only when its official draw identity is after the frozen boundary.
Boundary amendments after any eligible outcome becomes observable are prohibited.

concrete_boundary_status.note: This is NOT an incomplete design: the deterministic boundary-selection algorithm is fully frozen. Execution readiness remains false until a future authorized task records the concrete values BEFORE outcome exposure.

invariants: ticket capture must precede outcome availability
no historical backfill into the prospective family
all future evaluation derives from prospective records only
prospective_capture_contract.infrastructure_basis: P271I/P271J ledger design (unactivated). P274A defines the contract only; it does not create, install, or activate any schema.

hypotheses.H0: prospective draw-level prize-aware success rate <= q_N (N=3)
hypotheses.H1: prospective draw-level prize-aware success rate > q_N (N=3)
hypotheses.test: exact one-sided upper binomial (or exact Poisson-binomial if per-draw N varies)

hypotheses.H0: prospective draw-level prize-aware success rate <= q_N (N=3)
hypotheses.H1: prospective draw-level prize-aware success rate > q_N (N=3)
hypotheses.test: exact one-sided upper binomial (or exact Poisson-binomial if per-draw N varies)

hypotheses.H0: prospective draw-level prize-aware success rate <= q_N (N=5)
hypotheses.H1: prospective draw-level prize-aware success rate > q_N (N=5)
hypotheses.test: exact one-sided upper binomial (or exact Poisson-binomial if per-draw N varies)

power_design.primary_alternative: candidate-specific 50%-shrunken retrospective excess at the 750 window: p_alt = q_N + 0.5 * (obs_rate_750 - q_N)
power_design.test: exact one-sided binomial at per-candidate alpha = 0.05/3
power_design.power_definition: P(X >= k* | n, p_alt) where k* = smallest k with P(X>=k | n, q_N) <= alpha
power_design.common_horizon_rule: max over candidates of the candidate-specific 90%-power N (NOT reduced because another candidate has a larger observed effect).

numerical_method_independent_crosscheck.method_a: regularized incomplete beta continued fraction (Numerical Recipes betai)

secondary_cp95_lower_scenario_descriptiv.note: NON-GOVERNING. Clopper-Pearson 95% lower bound of the retrospective 750-window rate as alternative; reported for sensitivity only; does not set the horizon.
NON-GOVERNING. Clopper-Pearson 95% lower bound of the retrospective 750-window rate as alternative; reported for sensitivity only; does not set the horizon.
NON-GOVERNING. Clopper-Pearson 95% lower bound of the retrospective 750-window rate as alternative; reported for sensitivity only; does not set the horizon.

common_final_horizon.calendar_basis: committed P268D1 cadence: DAILY_539 6 draws/week, 313.0714 draws/year (via P272B); descriptive only, not governing.

checkpoint_B_300_future_draws.futility_recommendation_only_when: conditional power below the frozen futility threshold

final_checkpoint.test: exact one-sided binomial (constant N) or exact one-sided Poisson-binomial (varying N)

alpha_control.design: equivalent-control: ALL efficacy alpha preserved for the final analysis

futility_contract.frozen_threshold: conditional power < 10% (0.10), evaluated at checkpoint B (300 draws) under the pre-registered 50%-shrunken alternative
futility_contract.continuation_despite_non_binding_futilit: requires documented owner decision BEFORE the next outcome look; cannot change final alpha

integrity_stop_rules.note: Integrity failure is classified SEPARATELY from statistical failure (it is not PROSPECTIVE_NULL/FAILED).

requirements: lower confidence bound exceeds exact null
no protocol amendment after boundary activation
PROSPECTIVE_CONFIRMED_RESEARCH_EDGE.meaning: future-only statistical confirmation FOR RESEARCH; NOT betting advice, NOT automatic production promotion, NOT registry/recommendation authorization.

requirements: no significant negative result requiring failure class
governed final analysis shows non-positive excess, OR
a separately pre-registered significantly-below-null criterion is met, OR
candidate closed under the pre-registered futility rule and owner accepts closure
final horizon/support cannot be reached within the governed observation period
leakage, identity, boundary, version, provenance or endpoint integrity breach

project_decision_classes.INSUFFICIENT_SUPPORT: evaluation cannot be completed within the governed observation period
project_decision_classes.PROTOCOL_INVALIDATED: any integrity/provenance breach invalidating the family

P271_dependencies.execution_requires: a future separate owner decision covering infrastructure, activation, maintenance, and production safety.

required_before_any_execution: separately authorized activation task writes concrete activation_timestamp_utc + first_eligible_target_draw BEFORE outcome exposure
maintenance/production-safety governance for any schema/runtime change

preliminary_result_reconciliation.vs_P272B: P272B quantified prospective detectability for the M3+ (hit>=3) any-bet endpoint, lottery-wide, under a P267C-derived +1.32pp scenario on a ~1.0% base (p1~2.32%), finding DAILY_539 N*(0.9)=1013 draws and decision POWER_QUANTIFIED_THRESHOLD_NOT_GOVERNED.
preliminary_result_reconciliation.P274A_difference: P274A targets the prize-aware M2+ endpoint (q_N ~0.30-0.45), is per-candidate (the three frozen P273A survivors), grounds the alternative in P273A's own 750-window excess with 50% shrinkage, and the threshold is now governed by explicit owner authorization.
preliminary_result_reconciliation.why_horizon_larger: P274A's larger common horizon (3605 draws) vs P272B's 1013 reflects a small RELATIVE lift (~1.18-1.25x) on a high base rate, not the ~2.3x lift of a rare event P272B modeled; same exact-binomial method and same alpha=0.05/3.

validation_summary.tests_note: Design/artifact validation only; source focused suite NOT RUN; full repository suite NOT RUN.

disclaimers: Design and pre-registration only; no execution, activation, or prospective data capture occurred.
Retrospective P273A evidence is NOT prospective confirmation; the future-only boundary has not been activated.
prediction_success_claim=false; this is not betting advice and not a deployment/production authorization.
Production apply remains NOT_READY_FOR_APPLY; P273B is not started.
Execution requires a separate owner authorization covering activation, infrastructure, and production safety.
